name: larky
description: Route Lark cards and message replies back to paused Codex sessions on an away Mac.

interface.shortDescription: Continue paused Codex tasks from Lark.
interface.longDescription: Notifies you with an interactive Lark card when a Codex task stops while your Mac is away, then routes a verified reply to the exact originating session.
defaultPrompt: Use Larky to report this paused coding task through Lark.
